title: LLM-Based Review Agents for Rapid Research Summarization

content.abstract: We propose an LLM-based multi-agent system for rapid research summarization. The system combines retrieval, ranking, and generation modules to produce related-work drafts. Experiments on a small benchmark show higher user preference than direct prompting baselines.

claims: The paper proposes a multi-agent system for rapid research summarization.
The system improves output quality relative to direct prompting baselines.
known_constraints: No detailed benchmark setup or statistical analysis available
target_output: short reviewer memo with simulated recommendation
